gcode.definitions.G0:
RAPID: Rapid linear movement. 

Usage: `G0 X<pos> Y<pos> Z<pos> E<pos> F<rate>`

`F` specifies the feed rate (speed, current units per minute) of the movement.

For 3D printing, `E` specifies the amount of filament to extrude.
gcode.definitions.G1:
FEED: Linear movement. 

Usage: `G1 X<pos> Y<pos> Z<pos> E<pos> F<rate>`

`F` specifies the feed rate (speed, current units per minute) of the movement.

For 3D printing, `E` specifies the amount of filament to extrude.

gcode.definitions.G11: RECOVER: Recover the filament with firmware-based retract.

gcode.definitions.G28:
AUTO HOME: Auto home one or more axes.

Usage: `G28 L<bool> X Y Z`

`L` is a flag to restore bed leveling state after homing, default true.

`X`, `Y`, and `Z` are flags to home specific axes, or omit all to home all axes.

gcode.definitions.M420:
BED LEVELING STATE: Get and/or set bed leveling state and parameters.

Usage: `M420 C<bool> L<int> S<bool> T<0|1|4> V<book> Z<linear>`

`C`: Center the mesh on the mean of the lowest and highest points

`L`: Load mesh from EEPROM index

`S`: Set enabled or disabled. A valid mesh is required to enable bed leveling.

`T`: Format to print the mesh data. `T0` is human readable, `T1` is CSV, and `T4` is compact form.

`V`: Verbose: Print the stored mesh / matrix data.

`Z`: Set Z fade height (reduce bed leveling compensation close to the height and disable compensation above it).
